name: chef
description: Cooking assistant for Chinese and Western cuisine. Recipes are pulled from real sources — xiachufang, douguo, meishij, allrecipes, BBC Good Food, Food Network, TheMealDB, and 10+ others — never fabricated. Ships with 604 pre-fetched recipes as evidence. Covers Chinese cuisines (川粤鲁苏闽浙湘徽家常) and Western (意法美式地中海英伦). Supports recipe walkthroughs, ingredient-based suggestions, nutrition lookup, pairing analysis, and substitution advice.
